name: Missing Password Field Masking
description: The product does not mask passwords during entry in user interface fields, increasing the risk that attackers or bystanders can observe and capture passwords through shoulder-surfing or screen capture.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[password_field] flowing to EGRESS[ui_display] without TRANSFORM[mask_input] mediating the display. The password input is rendered as plaintext rather than masked characters in the user interface.
